description: A new server has been provisioned to handle frontend build workloads. Register it as a Permanent Agent node in Jenkins named 'frontend-builder-01'. Configure the node with a remote root directory of /opt/jenkins-agent, 4 executors, and labels 'frontend linux high-mem'. Set the usage to only build jobs with label expressions matching this node and use the 'Launch agent by connecting it to the controller' launch method. You are already logged in as admin. If prompted, use Username: admin, Password: Admin123!
